draft: ISO/IEC DIS 24970:2025 — Artificial intelligence — AI system logging

obligations.source_quote: Providers of high-risk AI systems shall keep the logs referred to in Article 12(1), automatically generated by their high-risk AI systems, to the extent such logs are under their control.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system (as defined in Art. 3(3))

decomposed_atoms.description: Provider keeps automatically generated logs from Art. 12(1)
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The provider SHALL keep the logs referred to in Art. 12(1), automatically generated by their high-risk AI systems

decomposed_atoms.description: Log retention applies to the extent logs are under provider's control
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Log retention obligation applies to the extent such logs are under the provider's control

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Log storage configuration, log retention policies, log archival mechanisms, log persistence setup

obligations.source_quote: Without prejudice to applicable Union or national law, the logs shall be kept for a period appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system, of at least six months, unless provided otherwise in the applicable Union or national law, in particular in Union law on the protection of personal data.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Logs retained for at least six months
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Logs SHALL be kept for a period appropriate to the intended purpose, of at least six months

decomposed_atoms.description: Retention period is appropriate to the intended purpose of the system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The retention period SHALL be appropriate to the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Log retention configuration (TTL, expiry, rotation policies), log storage duration settings

obligations.source_quote: Providers that are financial institutions subject to requirements regarding their internal governance, arrangements or processes under Union financial services law shall maintain the logs automatically generated by their high-risk AI systems as part of the documentation kept under the relevant financial services law.
obligations.addressee_note: Provider that is a financial institution subject to Union financial services law

decomposed_atoms.description: Financial institution providers integrate AI logs into financial services documentation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Financial institution providers SHALL maintain AI system logs as part of financial services law documentation

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Financial services compliance configuration, regulatory log integration

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to providers that are financial institutions subject to Union financial services law
